title: Zero-G Hackathon
description: A 24-hour mission to build innovative solutions for real-world problems. Form a crew of up to 4 and launch your ideas.

title: AI Frontier Workshop
description: Hands-on sessions on LLMs, computer vision, and generative AI. Guided by engineers from leading AI labs.

title: Orbital Robotics Challenge
description: Program autonomous bots to navigate a simulated lunar surface. Fastest traversal wins.

title: Signal & Systems Talk
description: A keynote on the future of satellite communication and signal processing by a ISRO scientist.

title: Deep Space Devops
description: Containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native deployment strategies for production-scale systems.

title: Telescope Talks: Web3
description: Demystifying blockchain, decentralized apps, and the actual engineering behind the hype.

title: Radar CTF
description: Capture-the-Flag cybersecurity challenge. Test your offensive and defensive security skills.

title: Paper Presentation: Future Tech
description: Present your research paper on emerging tech — quantum computing, neuromorphic chips, or space propulsion.
